zero_slop_policy.statement: NO AI SLOP ALLOWED AT ALL - ZERO TOLERANCE TO SLOP AND HALLUCINATIONS
zero_slop_policy.strict_compliance: Mandatory. Every claim must be project-specific, evidence-backed, trace-linked, reviewer-challenged, and free of unsupported invention.
zero_slop_policy.missing_evidence_rule: If evidence is missing, mark it as an assumption, risk, open question, or failure.

title: Wealth.com Dark-Factory Run — Knowledge Graph Seed

token_budget_policy.current_swag_band: CHK-1 mid ~70K (Stage-0 + recon); CHK-2 mid ~400K full run pending checkpoint-#1

nodes.title: User intent: rigorous dark-factory run for wealth.com PRD
nodes.summary: User message 2026-04-25 demanding multi-day, conformance-first dark-factory run.

nodes.title: User intent: validate dark-factory skill system at scale
nodes.summary: Implicit second-order intent — running PRD through this much governance is a system test.

nodes.title: Attractor Run Record
nodes.summary: Foundational attractor pack for the run.

nodes.title: Product Tailoring Profile
nodes.summary: regulated-fintech-AI-SaaS archetype with surface flags + risk profile + method blend.

nodes.title: Generated Meta-Skill Contract
nodes.summary: Wealth.com-specific generated factory contract; refusal rules locked.

nodes.title: SDLC Stage Coverage Matrix
nodes.summary: 17 stages declared with status/owner/evidence/gate/waiver.

nodes.title: Engagement Governance Record (DRAFT)
nodes.summary: Client/delivery owner, scope baseline, token SWAG, checkpoints, change-control. Pending client approval.

nodes.title: AI extraction hallucination on legal documents → fiduciary harm
nodes.summary: Severity high; mitigated by deterministic-calc separation, citation grounding, holdout, human-review fallback.

nodes.title: Tax calculation error → IRS/state penalty exposure
nodes.summary: Severity high; mitigated by golden-dataset tests, deterministic engine, IRS-form citations.

nodes.title: UPL — unauthorized practice of law
nodes.summary: Severity high; mitigated by 'educational draft for attorney review' framing + attorney-of-record assignment.

nodes.title: Multi-tenant data leak between advisor firms
nodes.summary: Severity high; mitigated by Postgres RLS + connection-level + per-tenant KMS + audit log.

nodes.title: Factory overfit to wealth.com workload
nodes.summary: Severity medium; mitigated by layer_map enforcement + transfer-test bead.

nodes.title: PRD subagent slop — fabricated investor names, model names, doc counts
nodes.summary: Detected pre-downstream; quarantined; corrective re-dispatch with strict citation protocol; lesson L-001 drafted.

nodes.title: Domain-research subagent stalled at write transition
nodes.summary: Subagent ad2487c326e8732a0 stalled 600s+; will re-dispatch with smaller per-file scope.

nodes.title: Subagent type and provenance protocol must match task semantics
nodes.summary: Tasks needing artifacts must use write-capable agents; atomization tasks require line-number citations + grep verification.

nodes.title: Confirm scope_in/scope_out
nodes.summary: ATTR-WEALTHCOM-001 §human_decisions HD-001.

nodes.title: Brand substitution naming
nodes.summary: Avoid registered marks; default 'EstateCompass' / internal AI 'Sage'.

nodes.title: Tech stack confirmation
nodes.summary: Default Node+TS+Postgres+React+Python AI service+Anthropic Claude+Playwright.

nodes.title: Deployment target
nodes.summary: Default Docker Compose local-only at v0; production_surface=false.

nodes.title: Token budget SWAG approval
nodes.summary: low 150K, mid 400K, high 1.2M tokens for full run.

nodes.title: Stage-0 → Stage-1 client checkpoint
nodes.summary: Releases ~150K-1.2M token budget; pending.

nodes.title: Coherence Gate
nodes.summary: Goal one-sentence; scope explicit; examples labeled; open Q separated; next safe action concrete.

edges.rationale: Stage-0 bead is the smallest governed first action under user intent.
TB-002 was created in response to INC-001.
Stage-1 cannot start until checkpoint-#1 approved.
Tailoring locks deterministic-calc separation as architectural ADR.

waivers.rationale: v0 demo is local-only Docker Compose per HD-004 default. Stages defer until production_surface enabled.
waivers.expiry: checkpoint-N where HD-004 is amended to enable production_surface
waivers.residual_risk: v0 demo cannot be deployed to real production without re-entering deferred stages.

waivers.rationale: Scoped down to single-user microbench at v0; full load test not meaningful for local demo.
waivers.residual_risk: Performance behavior under multi-tenant load is unverified at v0.

waivers.rationale: Greenfield run; no brownfield code to maintain.
waivers.expiry: permanent for this run; future maintenance runs will trigger df-brownfield-recon

findings: Seed has 30+ nodes and 24 edges; covers intent → bead → gate → risk → evidence → lesson → incident → human-decision relationships. Will expand significantly during stage-1 intake (one node per requirement leaf, per artifact, per test, per code change).
